notes: Animal products and fresh items may be restricted
There is no limit on bringing cash into Germany, but amounts over €10,000 must be declared.
Duty-free allowances apply when entering Germany, especially for non-EU travel.
Personal electronics can be brought into Germany, but high-value items may be subject to duty.
Medication can be brought into Germany for personal use, but controlled substances require documentation.
Tobacco can be brought into Germany within EU or duty-free limits depending on origin.
Most weapons are prohibited from being brought into Germany, with strict import regulations.
Prescription drugs can be brought into Germany for personal use, but controlled substances require documentation.
You must declare goods when entering Germany if they exceed allowances or are restricted items.
